column1: Doctors and nurses often___________people in community clinics. (to help)
The book you_______________for hasn't arrived yet. (to wait)
Hi, Bob! I'm glad to meet you here at the exhibition. How's life? What________________now? (you to do)
Jacob says the train____________according to the timetable. (to arrive)
I______________when he is going to come back. (to forget)
